project_overview.name: WorkQuire Landing Page
project_overview.visual_mood: Sleek dark navy + warm amber accents (premium/professional)
project_overview.3d_intensity: Medium (Three.js animated mesh/particles in hero + scroll-linked depth)

surfaces.cards: bg-gray-800/50 border border-white/5 rounded-2xl p-6 md:p-8 hover:border-amber-500/30 transition-colors duration-300

hero_bg_fallback.description: Abstract 3D mesh network in dark navy with amber glowing nodes. Use as background fallback for Three.js canvas or base layer.

business_owner_struggle.description: Professional team collaborating in a dark modern office.

freelancer_struggle.description: Modern remote worker typing on laptop, dark cinematic lighting.

process_section.description: Desk with computer in dark lighting.

page_structure.layout: Sticky top navigation (z-50) using glassmorphism. Mobile responsive with hamburger menu.
page_structure.interactions: Nav background becomes solid/glass on scroll. CTAs have amber glow on hover.

page_structure.layout: Full viewport height (min-h-screen), centered content. 3D Canvas absolute positioned behind content.

content.headline: Where Digital talent and Business needs come together
content.description: Bridging top-tier talent with ambitious organizations. From onboarding to execution, we make collaboration simple and effective.

page_structure.tech: React Three Fiber (@react-three/fiber, @react-three/drei). Render a subtle animated particle mesh or wireframe that reacts gently to mouse movement and scroll. Keep it dark navy and amber to match the aesthetic.

page_structure.layout: Bento Grid (Mode A: 'Tetris' Grid). Large text focus. Wide gaps (gap-8).

content.about: We bridge talent by recruiting and developing skilled individuals, then matching them with organizations that need specialized online services.
content.mission: Prioritizing professionalism, accountability, and performance to help clients achieve operational excellence.
content.vision: To become a trusted partner that helps businesses scale with reliable remote professionals, providing freelancers with stable, growth-oriented career opportunities.

page_structure.layout: Vertical line down the center (or left on mobile). Staggered scroll-reveal cards.

content.title: Founding Year (2021)
content.desc: Started by referring talents to clients, friends, and family.

content.title: Growing Demand
content.desc: Increased need for specialized digital professionals.

content.title: Freelance Network Growth
content.desc: Expanding access to skilled talents across multiple roles.

content.title: Formal Launch
content.desc: Established as a hiring agency focused on alignment and performance.

page_structure.layout: Split layout (2 columns on desktop). Left: Business Owners. Right: Freelancers. Use images as atmospheric backgrounds or alongside text.

content.resolution: A structured, trustworthy hiring system that protects both businesses and talents.

page_structure.layout: Dense Grid (Mode B: 'Control Room' Grid). Uses 1px solid borders, hover states to highlight amber.

content.title: Tell Us What You Need
content.desc: Share your business goals, skills needed, and expectations.

content.title: We Match You
content.desc: We carefully recommend qualified talent aligned with your needs.

content.title: Collaborate & Scale
content.desc: Work with your chosen talent and focus on growing your business.

page_structure.layout: Rendered as specialized contact sections or Shadcn Dialog modals. Must connect to a backend API to save to DB and send email.

styling.responsive: Mobile-first down to 320px. Use clamp() for fluid typography on headings.
styling.animations: Use Framer Motion 'whileInView' for scroll reveals. Keep 3D animations in Hero subtle (use useFrame for slow rotation).

testing.data_testid: ALL interactive elements (buttons, links, inputs, form submissions) MUST have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case format based on their role (e.g., data-testid='inquire-va-button').

backend.inquiry_forms: Implement FastAPI endpoints to handle form submissions (VA Inquiry and Team Inquiry). Save to SQLite/PostgreSQL DB and trigger a mock/real email notification.

development_rules.file_extensions: Use .js and .jsx extensions for frontend files (not .tsx).
